title: trifolium somalense
intro: Trifolium somalense is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae, specifically a type of wild clover native to East Africa. The medicinal properties of Trifolium somalense include its antibacterial and antifungal properties, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Trifolium somalense typically involve drying and infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water, which can be used as a tea or decoction to harness its medicinal properties.
